context: Evaluates the implementation of the 'Adaptive Testing' strategy, specifically checking for sociable unit tests, the use of hand-written fakes, and behavioral assertions instead of mocking frameworks.

checklist.name: Sociable testing via Public API
checklist.description: Tests the entire Business-Module (BM) through its main public interface or entry point rather than testing individual internal classes in isolation.

checklist.name: Hand-written Fake usage
checklist.description: Uses at least one hand-written 'Fake' class (e.g., InMemoryRepo) to satisfy external dependencies of the BM.

checklist.name: Minimal Mocking Framework usage
checklist.description: Does NOT rely on automated mocking frameworks (e.g., jest.mock, mockito) for internal module behavior or dependencies.

checklist.name: State-based behavioral assertions
checklist.description: Assertions check for the final state or return value through the public API rather than verifying calls to mocks (interaction testing).
